ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., reinforcement learning, supervised learning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model type was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model type */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., in_progress, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this evaluation belongs to */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "total_exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time of the experiment */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss after the experiment */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss before the experiment */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return of the experiment */,
  "max_kl" REAL /* Maximum KL divergence of the experiment */,
  "mean_kl" REAL /* Mean KL divergence of the experiment */,
  "itr_time" REAL /* Iteration time of the experiment */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the experiment */,
  "num_trajs" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories in the experiment */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of the return of the experiment */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return of the experiment */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the experiment */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return of the experiment */,
  "average_policy_std" REAL /* Average policy standard deviation of the experiment */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity of the experiment */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the evaluation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the evaluation */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_versions" (
  "evaluation_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation version */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the evaluation version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation version was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the evaluation version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_versions_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_readmes" (
  "model_readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model readme */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this readme belongs to */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model readme */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model readme was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model readme */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model readme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_readmes_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_readmes" (
  "evaluation_readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation readme */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation this readme belongs to */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the evaluation readme */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation readme was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the evaluation readme */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation readme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_readmes_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "model_hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model hyperparameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model hyperparameter was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model hyperparameter */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this permission belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
